info.description: Backend API for Alemancenter Educational Platform.
info.title: Alemancenter API

post.description: Generate article content automatically using AI based on a provided title

get.description: Returns a paginated list of active/published articles

parameters.description: Filter by file category (e.g. worksheet, exam)
parameters.name: file_category

get.description: Returns a paginated list of published articles for a specific grade level
Returns a paginated list of published articles containing a specific keyword
Serves the actual file binary if the provided download token is valid and unexpired
Direct file download. Note: Use GetDownloadToken instead for secure downloads
Generates a short-lived, signed token allowing a user to download an article's file securely
Get a single published article by ID

post.description: Permanently deletes the authenticated user's account (requires password)
Resends the verification email to the authenticated user

get.description: Verifies a user's email address using ID and Hash from email link

post.description: Authenticate user using a Google OAuth Token (from mobile apps or frontend)
Authenticate user and return JWT token
Invalidate the current JWT token
Initiates the password reset process by sending an email
Reset user password using the token sent to their email

put.description: Updates the profile details (name, bio, job title, photo) of the authenticated user

post.description: Register a device push token for the authenticated user
Issue a new JWT access token using a refresh token
Register a new user account

get.description: Returns the profile data of the currently authenticated user
Returns all active categories for the specified country
Get a category by its ID
Returns the main dashboard summary including articles, posts, and file counts
Returns a paginated list of all articles for dashboard management

post.description: Create a new article from the dashboard

get.description: Returns necessary data (subjects, classes, semesters) to populate the article creation form
Returns dashboard statistics for articles (total, published, draft, pending)

put.description: Update an existing article from the dashboard

get.description: Returns the article details along with necessary data (subjects, classes) to populate the edit form

post.description: Change article status to published
Change article status to draft/unpublished

get.description: Returns available calendar databases/countries
Returns a list of calendar events for dashboard management, optionally filtered by date range

put.description: Update an existing calendar event by ID

delete.description: Delete an existing calendar event by ID

get.description: Returns a paginated list of categories for dashboard management

post.description: Create a new category

get.description: Get a single category for dashboard viewing/editing

get.description: Get performance metrics for articles and posts (e.g., views)

parameters.description: Filter by file type (e.g. image, document)
parameters.name: type

post.description: Upload a file and attach it to an article or post, or upload it independently

get.description: Get metadata for a specific file by ID

delete.description: Delete a file record and remove the file from storage

get.description: Direct download of a file via dashboard

post.description: Save a message as a draft for later sending

get.description: Returns a paginated list of draft messages for the authenticated user
Returns a paginated list of received messages for the authenticated user

post.description: Send a new message to another user

get.description: Returns a paginated list of messages sent by the authenticated user
Returns the details of a single message by ID

post.description: Toggle the importance flag (star) on a message
Mark a specific received message as read

get.description: Returns a paginated list of notifications for the authenticated user

parameters.description: Filter by unread status (1 for true)
parameters.name: unread

post.description: Programmatically create a new notification for a user
Perform an action (e.g., read, delete) on multiple notifications

get.description: Returns the 10 most recent notifications and the total unread count

post.description: Delete old, already-read notifications (e.g., older than 30 days)
Mark all notifications as read for the authenticated user

delete.description: Delete a specific notification by ID

post.description: Mark a specific notification as read

get.description: Returns the Redis cache hit ratio and total keys
Fast lightweight endpoint for polling live server load (CPU, Mem)
Returns the latency of an internal cache (Redis) ping
Get comprehensive backend performance metrics (uptime, memory, GC)
Returns a list of all permissions

put.description: Update an existing permission by ID

post.description: Create a new post from the dashboard

post.description: Toggle the is_active status of a post
Set a key-value pair in Redis with an optional TTL
Validate and update Redis connection settings (Requires restart to apply fully)

get.description: Returns internal Redis server information and statistics
Returns a list of Redis keys matching a specific pattern
Ping the Redis server to check connectivity and health

get.description: Get role details by ID

Securely upload an image (e.g. from authenticated dashboard)

get.description: Returns details, status, and recent logs for a specific IP address

Mark a specific IP address as trusted (bypassing certain limits)

Remove a specific IP address from the trusted list

parameters.name: severity

Tests the configured SMTP server connection

recipient.description: Recipient is populated at query time from the conversation, not stored in DB.
